//: Merge these blocks into your Claude Code settings.json (per-user or per-project).
//paths: Use ABSOLUTE paths. Replace <PYTHON> with your python.exe and <REPO> with the absolute path to this repo.
//python: Use python.exe (NOT pythonw.exe) for these hooks: they MUST write their JSON result to stdout.
//chezmoi: If settings.json is chezmoi-managed, edit the chezmoi SOURCE then `chezmoi apply` — a session-end sync will otherwise revert direct edits.

env.//: Route Claude Code through the LiteLLM proxy so prompts are tokenized before they reach Anthropic.
